<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Case Management — External Portal</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="caseCreateContainer"></div>
    <div id="caseListContainer"></div>

    <!-- Lightning Out 2.0 embed snippet (generated by Salesforce Setup UI) -->
    <lightning-out-application
        src="https://<yourSiteDomain>/lightning/lightning.out.js"
        tag="c-case-create-form"
        target="caseCreateContainer">
    </lightning-out-application>

    <lightning-out-application
        src="https://<yourSiteDomain>/lightning/lightning.out.js"
        tag="c-case-list"
        target="caseListContainer">
    </lightning-out-application>
</body>
</html>
